AboutContent:
Goodbye Ahmet - DPI Security Tool
Version 1.0

Goodbye Ahmet is a GUI wrapper designed to help you bypass Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) systems and access blocked websites freely.

This application is powered by the GoodbyeDPI project.

Credits:
GoodbyeDPI by ValdikSS
https://github.com/ValdikSS/GoodbyeDPI
ValidationTtl: TTL must be an integer between 1 and 255.
ValidationIpV4: DNS IPv4 address is not a valid IP.
ValidationIpV6: DNS IPv6 address is not a valid IP.
ValidationPortV4: DNS IPv4 port must be between 1 and 65535.
ValidationPortV6: DNS IPv6 port must be between 1 and 65535.
GoodbyeDpiCrashed: GoodbyeDPI stopped unexpectedly (exit code {0}). See logs for details.
NotAdminWarning: GoodbyeDPI requires administrator privileges. Please restart the application as administrator.
